title: klasea boetica subsp. lusitanica
intro: Klasea boetica subsp. lusitanica, also known as Klasea lusitanica, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Klasea boetica subsp. lusitanica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
